result:
## Summary

All tasks complete. **39 tests pass, server binary builds successfully.**

### What was built

| Package | Files | Tests |
|---------|-------|-------|
| `internal/model` | `workflow.go`, `run.go`, `event.go` | — (type definitions) |
| `internal/store` | `store.go`, `errors.go`, `store_test.go` | 13 tests |
| `internal/executor` | `executor.go`, `scheduler.go`, `executor_test.go` | 6 tests (11 sub-tests) |
| `internal/activity` | `registry.go`, `builtin.go`, `worker.go`, `worker_test.go` | 8 tests |
| `internal/handler` | `handler.go`, `types.go`, `handler_test.go` | 12 tests |
| `internal/config` | `config.go` | — |
| `cmd/server` | `main.go` | — (entrypoint) |

### Team assignments & results
- **Store & State Engineer** → SQLite store with all CRUD operations, `ClaimNextActivity` with mutex-guarded transactions, and concurrency tests
- **Scheduler & Executor Engineer** → Workflow executor with input expression resolution (`$.input`, `$.steps[N].output`), scheduler polling loop
- **Activity Runtime Engineer** → Activity registry, 5 built-in handlers (noop, sleep, http-call, log, fail), worker pool with heartbeating and retry logic
- **Me (Workflow Engine Lead)** → Model types, HTTP handlers with chi routing, config, server entrypoint with graceful shutdown
